name: Improper Check for Certificate Revocation
description: The product does not check or incorrectly checks the revocation status of a certificate, which may cause it to use a certificate that has been compromised. Revoked certificates are particularly dangerous because revocation typically indicates active compromise.
detection_pattern: Look for EXTERNAL nodes (presented certificate, peer certificate) that flow to AUTH nodes (trust decision, connection authentication) without a CONTROL mediator (CRL check, OCSP validation, revocation status query) that verifies the certificate has not been revoked before granting trust.
